title: stardust:qa allowlist (stardust/qa/allowlist.json)
description: Documented non-defects. A finding is allowlisted when every provided field matches. Allowlisted findings remain in the report, marked, so evidence is never deleted. Every entry must say WHY it is a non-defect.

path.description: exact path, or prefix ending in '*' (omit = any)

messagePattern.description: JS regex tested against the finding message (omit = any)

reason.description: why this is a documented non-defect (who decided, when, and the source of truth)
